# CloudAgent

## Overview
CloudAgent is an AI-powered cloud operations platform that uses autonomous agents to manage, secure, and optimize cloud infrastructure.

It combines CSPM, infrastructure governance, compliance automation, and cloud cost optimization in a single system. Agents can plan, execute, and verify actions with human approval for state-changing operations.

## Core Capabilities

### Cloud Automation
- Deploy and manage infrastructure with AI-assisted workflows
- Generate infrastructure templates and enforce deployment guardrails
- Run scheduled, manual, and event-driven automations
- Operate through conversational commands in Command Center

### Security
- Continuous cloud security posture management (CSPM)
- Detect misconfigurations and security risks
- Enforce security baselines (192 rules across 42 AWS services, 11 categories)
- Validate deployments with CloudFormation Guard before rollout

### Cost Optimization
- Identify unused and underutilized resources
- Apply rightsizing and scheduling recommendations
- Reduce cloud waste via automated optimization workflows

### Compliance
- Continuous monitoring and compliance reporting across 20+ frameworks
- Supports frameworks including SOC 2, HIPAA, PCI DSS, GDPR, ISO 27001, NIST, FedRAMP, CIS, and CMMC
- Produces audit-ready reports and executive summaries

### Agentic Workflows
- Autonomous agents execute operational, security, and cost tasks
- Human-in-the-loop approvals for state-changing actions
- Full audit trail of agent decisions and actions

## Key Differentiation
- Takes action, not only alerting or dashboarding
- Unifies DevOps, SecOps, FinOps, and compliance workflows
- Uses AI agents with governed execution and approvals
- Enables infrastructure operations from natural language interfaces and IDE integrations via MCP

## Target Users
- MSPs and cloud consultancies managing multiple client environments
- Security teams and CISOs running continuous posture and compliance checks
- FinOps and finance teams controlling cloud spend
- Platform engineering and DevOps teams enabling governed self-service infrastructure
- Engineering leadership requiring visibility, governance, and audit readiness

## Use Cases
- Automated cloud misconfiguration detection and remediation
- Cloud cost optimization and waste reduction
- Security and compliance review with report generation
- Infrastructure governance and policy enforcement
- Workload discovery, cataloging, and architecture documentation
- Backup operations and restore testing workflows
- Threat investigation and remediation (preview)

## Positioning
CloudAgent is an AI cloud engineer platform for organizations that want proactive cloud operations instead of manual, ticket-heavy workflows.

## Supported Platforms
- AWS: full coverage, available now
- Google Workspace: available now
- Azure: early access
- GCP: coming soon
- Entra ID: coming soon
- GitHub: coming soon
- GitLab: coming soon

## Integrations
- IDE and AI tools via MCP: Cursor, VS Code, Claude Desktop, ChatGPT, JetBrains, Windsurf
- Jira integration (OAuth)
- GitHub app integration for template commit workflows
- SSO providers: Okta, Azure AD, Google

## Security Architecture
- Read-only IAM roles by default
- Explicit write permissions required per action
- AWS STS temporary credentials (no static credential storage)
- Sensitive data access explicitly denied where required
- Human approval gates for state-changing operations
- Full audit trails for agent actions
- Self-hosted option for regulated environments

## Pricing
- Free: $0/month
- Individual: $25/month
- Teams: $500/month
- Enterprise: contact sales

Credit model:
- Workflows consume 1 credit
- Reports consume 20 credits
- Subscriptions include credits with optional add-ons

## Summary
CloudAgent enables teams to run, secure, and optimize cloud environments with autonomous AI agents that continuously monitor systems and take governed action, reducing manual cloud operations while improving security, compliance, and cost efficiency.
